stoneart.name: Monument & Stone Art / Sculptors
stoneart.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Marble & granite statues banner. Custom temple & carving work. CTA: "Inquire Custom Marble Art". USPs: Handcrafted, High Durability, PAN India Shipping.
PAGE 2 — PRODUCTS (===PAGE:products===):
- Category tabs [Religious Idols] [Home Decor] [Temple Pillars]. High-res photo gallery with dimensions & material type.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Sculptor heritage story. Client testimonials. Custom order inquiry form (marble type select, size, "send design on WhatsApp"). Map location & UPI advance QR.

locksmith.name: Locksmith & Key Makers
locksmith.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Emergency locksmith hero for home, office and vehicle lockouts. CTA: "Call Locksmith Now". Show 24/7 response, damage-free opening and verified technicians.
PAGE 2 — SERVICES (===PAGE:services===):
- Service cards for duplicate keys, lock repair, car keys, digital locks and safe opening, with visit charges and starting rates.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Technician credentials, service-area map and reviews. Booking form asks lock type, location, urgency and photo upload; WhatsApp dispatch and UPI payment QR.

poolcare.name: Swimming Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
poolcare.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Sparkling pool before-and-after hero. Residential, society and hotel maintenance. CTA: "Book Pool Inspection". Highlight water testing, trained staff and AMC support.
PAGE 2 — PACKAGES (===PAGE:packages===):
- One-time cleaning, weekly care and annual maintenance packages. Include skimming, vacuuming, filter service, chlorine/pH balancing and pool-size-based rates.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Maintenance process, equipment gallery and client reviews. Form asks pool type, dimensions, current water condition and preferred visit date; map, WhatsApp and UPI QR.

artclass.name: Drawing, Painting & Fine Art Classes
artclass.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Colorful student artwork hero with kids and adult batches. CTA: "Book Free Trial Class". Feature expert artists, small batches and exhibition opportunities.
PAGE 2 — COURSES (===PAGE:courses===):
- Course cards for drawing basics, watercolor, acrylic, sketching, canvas painting and entrance portfolio preparation, with age group, duration and monthly fees.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Teacher profiles, student gallery, certificates and testimonials. Admission form asks age, skill level, course and batch timing; studio map, WhatsApp and fee UPI QR.

icecream.name: Ice Cream Parlour & Dessert Bar
icecream.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Vibrant ice-cream hero featuring signature scoops, sundaes and shakes. CTA: "Order on WhatsApp". Promote fresh batches, eggless choices and party tubs.
PAGE 2 — MENU (===PAGE:menu===):
- Filterable menu [Scoops] [Sundaes] [Shakes] [Family Packs] with flavors, sizes, add-ons and prices; highlight seasonal specials and combo offers.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Brand story, outlet gallery and customer reviews. Custom cake/tub order form asks flavor, quantity, date and message; map, delivery WhatsApp and UPI QR.

watersupply.name: Water Tanker & Drinking Water Supply
watersupply.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Water tanker delivery hero for homes, societies, construction and events. CTA: "Book a Tanker". Show tested water, quick dispatch and bulk capacity.
PAGE 2 — RATES (===PAGE:rates===):
- Rate cards by tanker capacity and water type: drinking, borewell/utility and construction water. Include distance charges, subscription plans and emergency delivery rates.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Water quality proof, fleet photos and customer reviews. Booking form asks liters/tanker size, water type, full address, landmark and delivery time; live-call, WhatsApp and UPI QR.

plywood.name: Plywood, Laminate & Veneer Dealer
plywood.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Premium wood-finish hero with plywood, MDF, laminates and veneers. CTA: "Get Material Quote". Display genuine brands, wholesale pricing and site delivery.
PAGE 2 — CATALOG (===PAGE:catalog===):
- Catalog filters [Plywood] [MDF/HDF] [Laminates] [Veneers] [Hardware]. Show thickness, grade, sheet size, brand, warranty and per-sheet/quote rates.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Showroom gallery, brand partners and carpenter reviews. Quote form asks material list, thickness, quantity, project location and file upload; map, WhatsApp and UPI advance QR.

tentrental.name: Tent House & Event Equipment Rental
tentrental.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Grand event setup hero with shamiana, chairs, tables, stage and lighting. CTA: "Get Event Rental Quote". Highlight complete installation and clean inventory.
PAGE 2 — RENTAL CATALOG (===PAGE:catalog===):
- Rental catalog for tents, sofa/chairs, tables, crockery, coolers, carpets, stage and barricades. Show per-piece/per-day rates, packages and minimum quantity.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Past-event gallery, setup process and testimonials. Form asks event type, date, venue, guest count and required items; StadiumConnect link, WhatsApp and UPI advance QR.

astrology.name: Astrologer, Vastu & Kundli Services
astrology.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Celestial astrology hero for kundli, marriage matching, vastu and numerology. CTA: "Book Consultation". Emphasize privacy, experienced guidance and online sessions.
PAGE 2 — SERVICES (===PAGE:services===):
- Services with fixed rates: janam kundli, kundli milan, career/business reading, vastu visit, numerology and muhurat. Explain report format and delivery time.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Astrologer lineage, credentials and client testimonials. Form asks name, birth date, exact birth time, birthplace and concern; call/WhatsApp consultation and UPI dakshina QR.

invertershop.name: Inverter, Battery & UPS Dealer
invertershop.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Power-backup hero featuring home inverter, tubular battery and online UPS. CTA: "Find My Backup System". Show brand assurance, installation and warranty service.
PAGE 2 — PRODUCTS (===PAGE:products===):
- Product filters [Home Inverter] [Battery] [Office UPS] [Solar Combo], with VA/Ah capacity, backup estimate, supported appliances, brands and exchange prices.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Load calculator, installation photos and reviews. Recommendation form asks appliances, total load, backup hours, current battery and pincode; technician visit, WhatsApp quote and UPI QR.

scrap.name: Scrap Buyer & Kabadi Pickup
scrap.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Doorstep kabadi pickup hero for paper, metal, appliances and office scrap. CTA: "Schedule Pickup". Highlight live rates, digital weighing and instant payment.
PAGE 2 — SCRAP RATES (===PAGE:rates===):
- Daily rate board for newspaper, cardboard, iron, steel, copper, aluminium, plastic and e-waste, showing per-kg rates and bulk/commercial terms.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Recycling process, weighing proof and customer reviews. Pickup form asks scrap category, estimated weight, photos, floor/lift and address; WhatsApp confirmation and UPI settlement.

embroidery.name: Embroidery, Zari & Fabric Handwork
embroidery.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Rich textile hero showcasing zari, aari, zardozi and bridal blouse work. CTA: "Discuss Custom Design". Promote handcrafted detail and bridal expertise.
PAGE 2 — WORK CATALOG (===PAGE:services===):
- Style gallery [Aari] [Zardozi] [Maggam] [Bead Work] [Machine Embroidery] with per-piece/starting rates, timelines and fabric suitability.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Karigar story, close-up portfolio and client reviews. Order form asks garment type, fabric, occasion, budget, deadline and design upload; WhatsApp approval and UPI advance QR.

windows.name: Aluminium, uPVC Windows & Doors
windows.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Modern window-and-door hero for aluminium and uPVC fabrication. CTA: "Request Site Measurement". Highlight custom sizing, weather resistance and neat fitting.
PAGE 2 — PRODUCTS (===PAGE:products===):
- Product types [Sliding Windows] [Casement] [Doors] [Partitions] [Mosquito Mesh], showing profile, glass options, colors, hardware and per-sq.ft/quote rates.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Completed-site gallery, profile brands and warranty details. Form asks opening dimensions, product type, glass choice, quantity and site location; WhatsApp drawings, map and UPI advance QR.

meatshop.name: Fresh Meat, Chicken & Seafood Shop
meatshop.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Clean premium butcher-shop hero featuring chicken, mutton, fish and marinated cuts. CTA: "Order Fresh Cuts". Show daily freshness, hygiene and delivery.
PAGE 2 — PRODUCTS (===PAGE:menu===):
- Product tabs [Chicken] [Mutton] [Fish] [Marinated] with cut options, net weight, per-kg price, cleaning choice and availability badges.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Sourcing and hygiene process, store photos and reviews. Order form asks product, cut style, quantity, delivery slot and address; WhatsApp order, map and UPI QR.

evshowroom.name: Electric Scooter & EV Showroom
evshowroom.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Futuristic electric scooter hero with range and savings message. CTA: "Book Test Ride". Highlight low running cost, easy finance and local service.
PAGE 2 — MODELS (===PAGE:models===):
- Model comparison cards with ex-showroom price, certified range, top speed, battery, charging time, colors, subsidy and EMI; compare up to three EVs.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Savings calculator, showroom gallery and owner reviews. Test-ride form asks model, name, phone, city and preferred date; map, WhatsApp and booking UPI QR.

musicshop.name: Musical Instruments & Recording Gear
musicshop.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Energetic music-store hero with guitars, keyboards, drums and microphones. CTA: "Book a Product Demo". Feature genuine gear, expert help and repairs.
PAGE 2 — CATALOG (===PAGE:catalog===):
- Catalog filters [Guitars] [Keyboards] [Drums] [Studio] [Accessories], with brand, model, specifications, stock, price and rental/finance options.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Demo room gallery, artist testimonials and brand partners. Enquiry form asks instrument, experience level, budget and demo date; store map, WhatsApp and UPI QR.

laundry.name: Laundry, Dry Cleaning & Ironing
laundry.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Fresh laundry hero offering wash-fold, steam iron and dry cleaning. CTA: "Schedule Pickup". Show fabric-safe processes, doorstep service and express delivery.
PAGE 2 — RATE CARD (===PAGE:rates===):
- Rate card tabs [Wash & Fold] [Ironing] [Dry Clean] [Household] with per-kg/per-piece rates, minimum order, express surcharge and subscription plans.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Cleaning process, stain policy and reviews. Pickup form asks service, item count/weight, stain notes, address and time slot; order tracking link, WhatsApp and UPI QR.

xerox.name: Xerox, Scanning & Document Centre
xerox.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Busy document-center hero for Xerox, color print, scan, lamination and binding. CTA: "Send File on WhatsApp". Highlight speed and student/bulk rates.

- Rate list for B&W/color copies, A4/A3 printing, scanning, lamination, spiral binding, photo print and online forms, with per-page and bulk slabs.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Machine setup, sample work and customer reviews. Order form asks service, paper size, copies, color/duplex and file upload; map, WhatsApp delivery and UPI QR.

organiccosmetics.name: Organic Cosmetics & Herbal Skincare
organiccosmetics.text:

- Botanical beauty hero with face, hair and body essentials. CTA: "Shop Natural Care". Emphasize ingredient transparency, cruelty-free products and consultations.

- Product filters [Face] [Hair] [Body] [Gift Sets], showing ingredients, skin type, benefits, size, usage and price; include combo savings and bestseller badges.

- Founder and sourcing story, ingredient glossary and reviews. Consultation/order form asks skin/hair concern, allergies, products and address; WhatsApp guidance and UPI QR.

medequip.name: Medical Equipment Sales & Rental

- Catalog [Respiratory] [Mobility] [Beds] [Monitoring] [Surgical], with specifications, purchase/rental rates, deposit, availability and delivery coverage.

- Brand certifications, installation process and caregiver reviews. Requirement form asks patient need, equipment, rent/buy, duration, prescription upload and address; urgent call, WhatsApp and UPI QR.

earthmovers.name: JCB, Crane & Heavy Earthmover Rental

- Fleet cards for JCB/backhoe, excavator, poclain, hydra crane, loader and dumper, showing capacity, attachments and hourly/8-hour shift rates.

- Project gallery, safety records and contractor reviews. Booking form asks machine, work type, site location, required hours/days and start date; WhatsApp dispatch and UPI advance QR.

borewell.name: Borewell Drilling & Pump Installation

- Borewell rig hero for residential, farm and industrial drilling. CTA: "Request Site Survey". Highlight experienced crew, modern rigs and complete pump setup.

waterproofing.name: Waterproofing & Leakage Repair

- Before-and-after leakage hero for terraces, bathrooms, tanks and walls. CTA: "Book Leak Inspection". Feature diagnosis, branded chemicals and warranty.

- Application process, warranty terms and project photos. Inspection form asks leakage area, property type, approximate size, age and photo upload; WhatsApp inspection and UPI advance QR.

glassrailing.name: Glass Railing, Facade & Toughened Glass

scaffolding.name: Scaffolding & Shuttering Rental
scaffolding.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):

balloondecor.name: Balloon Decoration & Party Styling
balloondecor.text:

flowershop.name: Florist, Bouquets & Floral Decor
flowershop.text:

framing.name: Photo Framing & Custom Frames

acoustics.name: Acoustic Treatment & Soundproofing

- Premium studio acoustic hero with panels, bass traps and insulated rooms. CTA: "Book Acoustic Assessment". Feature measurement-led design and installation.

antiques.name: Antiques & Vintage Collectibles

matrimony.name: Matrimonial & Matchmaking Service
matrimony.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Warm trust-led matrimony hero for serious family-assisted matches. CTA: "Register Profile". Highlight verified profiles, privacy and personal matchmaking.

selfdrive.name: Self-Drive Car Rental

PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Road-trip car hero with hatchback, sedan and SUV rentals. CTA: "Check Car Availability". Show clean vehicles, flexible plans and support.

tempotravel.name: Tempo Traveller & Group Tour Rental

PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Group-travel hero with luxury tempo travellers and minibuses. CTA: "Get Trip Fare". Feature clean seating, professional drivers and outstation service.

- Fleet cards for 9, 12, 17 and 20-seater vehicles with AC, pushback seats, luggage, per-km/day rates, driver allowance, toll and minimum billing.

evcharging.name: EV Charging Station & Charger Installation

PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):

bikerepair.name: Bike Repair & Two-Wheeler Service
bikerepair.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):

freight.name: Freight Transport & Truck Booking

heavydriving.name: Heavy Vehicle Driving School

PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Hero positions accessible farm calls, prevention and urgent livestock care.
PAGE 2 — FARM CARE (===PAGE:farmcare===):
- Farm Care covers treatment, vaccination, fertility, nutrition, herd checks and biosecurity.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Visit request captures species, animal count, symptoms, urgency, village and directions.

petrelocation.name: Domestic & International Pet Relocation
petrelocation.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Hero reduces relocation anxiety with coordinated, welfare-first travel management.
PAGE 2 — RELOCATION PLANS (===PAGE:journeys===):
- Relocation Plans explains domestic, international, accompanied and door-to-door services.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Assessment asks pet, breed, origin, destination, target date, vaccinations and travel mode.

aquariummaintenance.name: Aquarium Repair & Maintenance
aquariummaintenance.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Hero addresses cloudy water, leaks, failing equipment and routine tank care.
PAGE 2 — MAINTENANCE (===PAGE:maintenance===):
- Maintenance page covers cleaning, water testing, filter repair, setup moves and AMCs.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Service request captures tank type, size, issue, livestock, location and photos.

petapparel.name: Dog Clothing & Pet Accessories
petapparel.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Hero presents seasonal outfits, occasion wear and practical accessories.
PAGE 2 — SHOP (===PAGE:shop===):
- Shop page groups clothing, harnesses, bandanas, beds and personalized pieces.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Order support captures breed, measurements, item, color, personalization and delivery.

animalgenetics.name: Pet DNA & Genetic Testing
animalgenetics.text:
PAGE 1 — HOME (===PAGE:index===):
- Hero explains simple sample collection and actionable genetic insights for pet owners.
PAGE 2 — DNA TESTS (===PAGE:tests===):
- DNA Tests compares ancestry, breed, trait and health panels with report timelines.
PAGE 3 — CONTACT (===PAGE:contact===):
- Order page captures pet species, test choice, age, shipping address and vet-sharing consent.
